subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Two letters from thee were received, and both, like unto twin guide stars, were bright and luminous [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان دو نامه از شما رسید و هر دو چون دو نجم فرقدان روشن و تابان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
